mapper.sql: SELECT e.*, ep.paper_name, c.class_name, t.real_name AS create_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record er WHERE er.exam_id = e.exam_id AND er.status = 1) AS submit_count, CASE WHEN e.status >= 2 THEN (SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN er2.total_score >= ep2.pass_score THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) FROM exam_record er2 JOIN exam_paper ep2 ON e.paper_id = ep2.paper_id WHERE er2.exam_id = e.exam_id AND er2.status = 1) ELSE NULL END AS pass_rate FROM exam e LEFT JOIN exam_paper ep ON e.paper_id = ep.paper_id LEFT JOIN class c ON e.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON e.create_by = t.teacher_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam (exam_name, paper_id, class_id, start_time, end_time, status, allow_screen_switch, create_by) VALUES (#{examName}, #{paperId}, #{classId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{allowScreenSwitch}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam SET exam_name = #{examName}, paper_id = #{paperId}, class_id = #{classId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status}, allow_screen_switch = #{allowScreenSwitch} WHERE exam_id = #{examId}
